VehicleListing.title: VehicleListing
VehicleListing.description: Represents a vehicle listing in the Motores Zone application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VehicleListing entity.

sellerId.description: Reference to the User who is the seller.

make.description: The make of the vehicle (e.g., Toyota).

model.description: The model of the vehicle (e.g., Corolla).

year.description: The year the vehicle was manufactured.

priceUSD.description: The price of the vehicle in US dollars.

description.description: Detailed description of the vehicle listing.

imageUrls.description: URLs of the images associated with the vehicle listing.

is4x4.description: Indicates if the vehicle has 4x4 traction.

isArmored.description: Indicates if the vehicle is armored.

armorLevel.description: The armor level of the vehicle, from 1 to 7.

locationLatitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the vehicle's location.

locationLongitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the vehicle's location.

summary.description: AI generated summary of the listing.

marketplaceUrl.description: Optional URL to an external marketplace listing for status checking.

Seller.title: Seller
Seller.description: Represents a seller of vehicles, which is essentially a user profile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Seller entity, matches auth.uid.

phoneNumber.description: The seller's phone number used for verification.

isVerified.description: Indicates whether the seller has verified their phone number.

isBlocked.description: Indicates if the seller's account is blocked by an admin.

accountType.description: The type of seller account, for future features.

logoUrl.description: URL for the dealership's logo image.

heroUrl.description: URL for the dealership's hero or cover image.

ExchangeRate.title: ExchangeRate
ExchangeRate.description: Represents the exchange rate between USD and VES (Bolivares).

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExchangeRate entity.

rate.description: The current exchange rate (VES per USD).

lastUpdated.description: The date and time when the exchange rate was last updated.

Favorite.title: Favorite
Favorite.description: Represents a user's favorited vehicle listing. The document ID is the same as the vehicleId.

vehicleId.description: The ID of the favorited VehicleListing.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the vehicle was favorited.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. 'userId' corresponds to the user's auth.uid.

/users/{userId}/vehicleListings/{vehicle.description: Stores vehicle listings as a subcollection of a user. Leverages path-based ownership.

/users/{userId}/favorites/{vehicleId}.description: Stores a user's favorite vehicle listings. The document ID is the vehicleId.

/exchangeRates/{exchangeRateId}.description: Stores exchange rate data. This is likely an admin-managed collection.
